onboarding.purpose: Set up the user's account and route them into the platform. Capture the minimum to gate subscription + greet by name + route to wizard or dashboard. Preferences, composition, and identity details are observed from usage and refined via in-context prompts — not interrogated at signup.

screens.question: Who will you primarily be managing?

optionDescriptions.myself: Just tracking my own health and wellness
optionDescriptions.family: Tracking health with others — partner, kids, parents, siblings, roommates, or anyone you share care with

screens.question: How many family members will you track?
screens.subtitle: Including yourself and any pets. We'll recommend the right plan based on your answer.

optionDescriptions.2_to_5: Couples, parents with kids, small households
optionDescriptions.11_or_more: Large family, multiple households, caring for many

screens.question: What's your family's last name?
screens.subtitle: We'll use it to identify your household and pre-fill it when you add family members. Blended families or chosen families — pick whichever last name fits.

screens.question: What's your first name?
screens.subtitle: We'll use this to greet you. You can fill in the rest of your profile later from your account.

screens.question: Want to add someone now?
screens.subtitle: Family member, pet, or newborn — you'll pick the type next. Skip to set up later from your dashboard.

optionDescriptions.no: I'll do this later from the dashboard
